positive: A stylized, high-contrast depiction of a mystical forest guardian, rendered in a bold, neo-folk illustration style. The guardian, comprised of interwoven flora and glowing ethereal elements, stands centered in a symmetrical pose. The composition uses negative space effectively, emphasizing the strong silhouette of intertwining branches, leaves, and luminescent moss. Color direction should be deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and gold accents against a deep indigo background. The overall aesthetic must be suitable for screen printing on apparel, featuring clean lines, flat color blocking, and thick outlines. Inspired by linocut and Art Nouveau decorative motifs. Magical, harmonious, symmetrical, forest fauna, mythic nature art.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, artifacts, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, signature, text, writing, cropped, messy, noise, muted colors, grayscale
